_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for Live-Action Movieverse films (2007-2023)

data.name: Optimus Prime (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Towering red and blue robot with intricate mechanical detailing and flame-painted deco. Transforms into a long-nose Peterbilt 379 semi-truck with red flames over blue paintwork.

data.name: Optimus Prime (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Updated Peterbilt design with a more streamlined robot mode and added weaponized trailer that forms a jetpack and armor. Retains the iconic red-and-blue flame deco with additional silver detailing.

data.name: Optimus Prime (Age of Extinction / The Last Knight)
data.description: Dramatically redesigned robot mode with a knight-themed aesthetic, narrower waist, and more heroic proportions. Transforms into a Western Star 5700 XE custom semi-truck with a sleeker, modern cab design retaining blue and red flame livery.

data.name: Optimus Prime (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: G1-inspired flat-nose cab-over-engine semi-truck design with blocky, less organic proportions. Robot mode features a broader chest, iconic windshield windows on the torso, and a design closer to the classic 1980s cartoon look.

data.name: Bumblebee (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Compact yellow robot with a battle mask visor and door-wing kibble on the back. Transforms from a beat-up 1976 Camaro into a sleek 2009 Chevrolet Camaro concept in yellow with black racing stripes.

data.name: Bumblebee (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Updated robot mode with sharper panel lines and refined proportions. Transforms into the production 2011 Chevrolet Camaro SS in yellow with black stripes, reflecting the car's transition from concept to production.

data.name: Bumblebee (Age of Extinction / The Last Knight)
data.description: Significantly redesigned robot mode with a more angular, aggressive look and updated proportions. Transforms into a 2014 Chevrolet Camaro concept with a wider, more muscular body in yellow with black accents.

data.name: Bumblebee (Bumblebee)
data.description: G1-inspired design with a rounder, more cartoon-accurate robot mode featuring large blue eyes and a friendly face. Transforms into a yellow 1967 Volkswagen Beetle, paying homage to the original G1 character design.

data.name: Bumblebee (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Hybrid design blending G1-inspired rounded proportions with Bayverse mechanical complexity. Transforms into a yellow 1977 Chevrolet Camaro with black racing stripes, set in the 1994 time period.

data.name: Megatron (Transformers)
data.description: Alien, spiky silver robot with elongated limbs, clawed hands, and an asymmetric design. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet with no Earth-based alt mode, featuring sharp angular surfaces and ice-encrusted detailing.

data.name: Megatron (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Resurrected with a patched, battle-scarred body and a new Cybertronian flying tank alt mode. Robot mode features visible repair work from Constructicon parts and a more hunched, bestial posture with tank treads on the arms.

data.name: Megatron (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Heavily damaged and rusted robot mode with a tattered cape-like tarpaulin draped over his body. Head wound covered by a burlap hood. Transforms into a battered Mack Titan tanker truck in gunmetal gray, reflecting his diminished state.

data.name: Megatron (The Last Knight)
data.description: Fully restored with a sleek, knight-themed silver and black design featuring horned helmet and crusader-inspired armor plating. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet fighter with swept-back wings and angular stealth geometry.

data.name: Jazz (Transformers)
data.description: Sleek silver robot with a blue visor, compact athletic build, and smooth panel surfaces. Transforms into a silver Pontiac Solstice GXP with blue-tinted windshield.

data.name: Ironhide (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Bulky, heavily armored black robot with massive twin arm-mounted cannons and a gruff, battle-hardened appearance. Transforms into a black GMC TopKick C4500 pickup truck. Consistent design across all three films.

data.name: Ratchet (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon / Age of Extinction)
data.description: Chartreuse-yellow robot with medical cross markings and a distinctive crest on the head. Transforms into a yellow-green Hummer H2 search and rescue vehicle with emergency light bar. Consistent design across all films.

data.name: Starscream (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Hunched, gorilla-like silver robot with triangular chest formed from jet intake nacelles and chicken-leg stance. Covered in Cybertronian tattoo-like markings in ROTF. Transforms into a Lockheed Martin F-22 Raptor in desert camouflage.

data.name: Barricade (Transformers)
data.description: Menacing black and white robot with spiky protrusions and red eyes. Transforms into a black and white Saleen S281E police car with the motto 'To punish and enslave...' on the rear quarter panel.

data.name: Barricade (The Last Knight)
data.description: Redesigned with a bulkier, more aggressive robot mode and updated police car alt mode. Transforms into a black and white Ford Mustang police interceptor with 'To punish and enslave...' markings.

data.name: Frenzy (Transformers)
data.description: Tiny, hyper-kinetic silver robot with spindly limbs, multiple red eyes, and a chattering insectoid demeanor. Transforms into a GPX boombox CD player and later a Nokia cell phone.

data.name: Blackout (Transformers)
data.description: Massive dark gray and brown robot with rotor blades forming a back-mounted array and heavy digitigrade legs. Transforms into a Sikorsky MH-53 Pave Low helicopter in military olive drab.

data.name: Scorponok (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Mechanical scorpion drone with a segmented metallic body, pincer claws, and a stinger tail. Sandy tan coloring for desert camouflage. Burrows through sand using a drill-like head section.

data.name: Bonecrusher (Transformers)
data.description: Hunched, aggressive tan and brown robot with long claw-tipped arms and roller-skate feet. Transforms into a tan Force Protection Buffalo mine-resistant vehicle with a front-mounted mine-clearing arm.

data.name: Brawl (Transformers)
data.description: Stocky, heavily armed green and tan robot bristling with missile launchers and machine guns across his body. Transforms into a modified M1 Abrams tank with additional turret-mounted weapons.

data.name: The Fallen (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Ancient, towering dark bronze and black robot with a skeletal face, spear-like staff, and levitating movement via telekinesis. Body covered in intricate alien hieroglyphics and fire-scorched plating.

data.name: Soundwave (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Alien satellite form orbiting Earth, depicted as a spindly silver and blue mechanical structure with multiple sensor arrays and communication dishes. Rarely seen in full robot mode.

data.name: Soundwave (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Redesigned with a sleek silver robot mode featuring a distinctive visor face and chest-mounted Laserbeak deployment bay. Transforms into a silver Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG, a stark departure from his satellite form.

data.name: Ravage (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Sleek, one-eyed mechanical panther with a segmented spine, blade-tipped tail, and matte black finish. Bristling with spines and articulated claws for stealth infiltration.

data.name: Demolishor (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Enormous red and white robot that rolls on two giant wheels formed from excavator treads, creating a unicycle-like silhouette. Transforms into a massive Terex RH400 hydraulic mining excavator.

data.name: Sideways (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Slim, agile silver robot with a low-profile design built for speed. Transforms into a silver Audi R8 sports car. Brief screen appearance before being bisected by Sideswipe.

data.name: Scalpel (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Minuscule insectoid robot with multiple spindly legs, magnifying lens eye, and surgical tool appendages. Transforms into a microscope. Known as 'The Doctor' for his medical examination of captives.

data.name: Grindor (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Massive dark gray robot nearly identical to Blackout in design, with helicopter rotor array and heavy build. Transforms into a Sikorsky CH-53E Super Stallion helicopter.

data.name: Alice (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender disguised as a human college student with pale skin and dark hair. True form is a slim, metallic robot with a prehensile tongue-tentacle and bladed tail.

data.name: Jetfire (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Ancient, decrepit robot with a stooped posture, walking cane, and rust-covered plating. Features a long beard-like chin assembly and SR-71 Blackbird wings folded on the back. Transforms into a Lockheed SR-71 Blackbird.

data.name: Sideswipe (Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Sleek silver robot with wheeled feet for skating mobility and retractable arm-mounted blades. Transforms into a silver Chevrolet Corvette Stingray concept. Consistent design across both films.

data.name: Skids (Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Small, asymmetric green robot with an oversized left eye, buck tooth, and lanky proportions. Transforms into a green Chevrolet Beat concept car.

data.name: Mudflap (Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Small, asymmetric orange-red robot with an oversized right eye, prominent ears, and scrappy proportions. Transforms into a red-orange Chevrolet Trax concept car.

data.name: Arcee (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Slim, agile pink and red motorcycle-form robot with a single-wheeled lower body and feminine design. Transforms into a pink Ducati 848 motorcycle.

data.name: Chromia (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Compact blue motorcycle-form robot with a single-wheeled lower body and aggressive combat stance. Transforms into a blue Suzuki B-King motorcycle.

data.name: Elita-One (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Sleek purple and black motorcycle-form robot with a single-wheeled lower body. Transforms into a purple and black MV Agusta F4 motorcycle.

data.name: Jolt (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Medium-build blue robot with electro-whip weapons extending from both arms and a sleek, aerodynamic frame. Transforms into a blue Chevrolet Volt concept car.

data.name: Wheelie (Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Tiny blue robot with a single glowing eye and scruffy, makeshift appearance. Transforms into a blue radio-controlled Ford F-Series monster truck toy.

data.name: Devastator (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Colossal combined form towering over the pyramids, composed of multiple construction vehicles forming a hunched, ape-like silhouette. Features a massive vortex grinder mouth that vacuums up everything in its path.

data.name: Scavenger (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Large red construction vehicle robot that forms the upper torso of Devastator. Transforms into a red Terex O&K RH400 hydraulic excavator, similar in model to Demolishor but a distinct character.

data.name: Mixmaster (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Dark gray robot with the concrete mixer drum split across the torso and a tripod-like stance. Transforms into a black Mack concrete mixer truck. Forms the head section of Devastator.

data.name: Long Haul (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Bulky green robot with a dump truck bed forming a prominent back-mounted shell. Transforms into a green Caterpillar 773B dump truck. Forms the right leg of Devastator.

data.name: Scrapper (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Yellow robot with front-loader bucket arms and a stocky industrial frame. Transforms into a yellow Caterpillar 992G front-end loader. Forms the right arm of Devastator.

data.name: Hightower (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Yellow robot with a crane boom arm and lattice truss structures incorporated into the body. Transforms into a yellow Kobelco CK2500 truss crane. Forms the left arm of Devastator.

data.name: Overload (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Red articulated dump truck robot with a wide, low-slung frame. Transforms into a red KW Dart D4661 articulated dump truck. Forms the lower waist and hip section of Devastator.

data.name: Rampage (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Red and yellow robot with a distinctive jackhammer-like body that can split into a whip-limbed configuration. Transforms into a red and yellow Caterpillar D9 bulldozer. Forms the left leg of Devastator.

data.name: Leo Spitz (Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Young man with curly dark hair and an anxious demeanor, typically wearing casual college attire. Sam Witwicky's college roommate and conspiracy website operator.

data.name: John Keller (Transformers)
data.description: Older distinguished man with silver hair, typically seen in formal suits befitting his role as U.S. Secretary of Defense. Authoritative presence in government crisis scenes.

data.name: Sam Witwicky (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Young man with brown hair, lean build, typically in casual teenage attire progressing to young adult clothing across the trilogy. Portrayed by Shia LaBeouf.

data.name: Mikaela Banes (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen)
data.description: Young woman with long dark hair and athletic build, often in fitted casual clothing. Skilled mechanic who is as capable in a fight as the soldiers around her. Portrayed by Megan Fox.

data.name: William Lennox (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon / The Last Knight)
data.description: Fit military officer with short brown hair, typically in Army combat uniform or tactical gear. Promoted from Captain to Colonel across the series. Portrayed by Josh Duhamel.

data.name: Robert Epps (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Athletic military man in Air Force fatigues, often carrying communication equipment for calling in air strikes. Lennox's trusted combat partner. Portrayed by Tyrese Gibson.

data.name: Seymour Simmons (Transformers / Revenge of the Fallen / Dark of the Moon / The Last Knight)
data.description: Middle-aged man with dark hair, initially seen in black Sector Seven suit, later in increasingly eccentric civilian outfits as he transitions from government agent to author and ally. Portrayed by John Turturro.

data.name: Sentinel Prime (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Regal, elder red and black robot with a distinctive bearded chin plate and piercing blue eyes. Transforms into a red Rosenbauer Panther 6x6 airport fire truck with chrome accents.

data.name: Shockwave (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Dark purple and gray robot with a single glowing red eye, arm-mounted cannon, and heavy armored plating. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank. Commands the massive Driller creature.

data.name: Dino (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Sleek red robot with a lithe, athletic frame and twin arm-mounted bladed whips. Transforms into a red Ferrari 458 Italia. Distinctive Italian-accented characterization.

data.name: Que (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Blue-gray robot with Einstein-like wild hair, spectacle-like optics, and an eccentric inventor aesthetic. Transforms into a blue Mercedes-Benz E550. Resembles a robotic mad scientist.

data.name: Leadfoot (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Stocky, heavily armed red robot covered in weapons and sponsor decals. Transforms into a red NASCAR Sprint Cup Chevrolet Impala with Target #42 livery and mounted weaponry.

data.name: Topspin (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Burly blue robot festooned with weaponry and mechanical modifications. Transforms into a blue NASCAR Sprint Cup Chevrolet Impala with Lowe's #48 livery bristling with armor plating.

data.name: Roadbuster (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Green robot covered in heavy armament including a front-mounted chaingun. Transforms into a green NASCAR Sprint Cup Chevrolet Impala with Amp Energy #88 livery, extensively modified with weapons.

data.name: Laserbeak (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Black and red bird-like robot with swept-back wings and a pointed beak housing red optics. Versatile shapeshifter who can disguise as various objects including a pink Bumblebee toy and a desktop computer.

data.name: Igor (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Tiny, deformed robot resembling a walking severed head with stubby legs and a hunched posture. Made from salvaged Transformer parts with mismatched plating and a subservient demeanor.

data.name: Brains (Dark of the Moon / Age of Extinction)
data.description: Small blue robot with an oversized head, spectacle-like optics, and Einstein-hair detailing. Transforms into a Lenovo ThinkPad laptop. Chatty and knowledgeable despite his diminutive size.

data.name: Driller (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Enormous tentacled worm-like Cybertronian creature with a drill-tipped head and multiple metallic tentacles that can wrap around skyscrapers. Dark gray and bronze coloring with segmented armored plating.

data.name: Carly Spencer (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Young blonde woman typically dressed in fashionable professional attire befitting her position at an upscale firm. Sam Witwicky's girlfriend. Portrayed by Rosie Huntington-Whiteley.

data.name: Dylan Gould (Dark of the Moon)
data.description: Well-groomed, wealthy businessman in expensive suits with styled dark hair. Charming exterior masking his role as a Decepticon collaborator. Portrayed by Patrick Dempsey.

data.name: Lockdown (Age of Extinction)
data.description: Dark gunmetal and green robot with a distinctive face that transforms into a cannon barrel. Covered in trophies and weapons from defeated foes. Transforms into a gray Lamborghini Aventador LP 700-4.

data.name: Drift (Age of Extinction)
data.description: Sleek samurai-themed blue and black robot with a kabuto-style helmet, dual katanas, and flowing armor panels resembling robes. Triple changer that transforms into a blue Bugatti Veyron Grand Sport Vitesse and a helicopter.

data.name: Drift (The Last Knight)
data.description: Updated samurai-themed robot mode retaining the kabuto helmet and dual swords but with a new red and black color scheme. Transforms into a red and black Mercedes-AMG GT R.

data.name: Crosshairs (Age of Extinction / The Last Knight)
data.description: Green robot with a distinctive trench coat formed from car body panels, goggles perched on his forehead, and dual handguns. Transforms into a green 2014 Chevrolet C7 Corvette Stingray.

data.name: Hound (Age of Extinction / The Last Knight)
data.description: Rotund, heavily armed green robot with a beard-like chin assembly, cigar stub, bullet belt, and an enormous arsenal of weapons covering his body. Transforms into a green Oshkosh Defense FMTV tactical military truck.

data.name: Galvatron (Age of Extinction)
data.description: Man-made Transformer with a particulate transformation style, disassembling into floating cubes of Transformium rather than mechanical folding. Dark gray and purple robot with Megatron-influenced features. Transforms into a black Freightliner Argosy cab-over truck.

data.name: Stinger (Age of Extinction)
data.description: Sleek red and black KSI-created drone with a Bumblebee-derived design but more angular and menacing features. Uses particulate Transformium-based transformation. Transforms into a red Pagani Huayra.

data.name: Grimlock (Age of Extinction / The Last Knight)
data.description: Massive, heavily armored robot with a knight-like helm and powerful build. Transforms into a fire-breathing mechanical Tyrannosaurus rex with chrome and gunmetal plating, spikes along the spine, and glowing orange eyes.

data.name: Slug (Age of Extinction / The Last Knight)
data.description: Aggressive armored robot with a spiked frame and medieval knight aesthetic. Transforms into a fire-breathing mechanical Triceratops with heavy chrome and gray plating and prominent horn array.

data.name: Strafe (Age of Extinction / The Last Knight)
data.description: Winged robot with a knightly appearance and dual-headed beast mode. Transforms into a two-headed mechanical pteranodon with red and silver metallic plating and fire-breathing capability.

data.name: Scorn (Age of Extinction / The Last Knight)
data.description: Largest Dinobot with a powerful build and sail-backed beast mode. Transforms into a fire-breathing mechanical Spinosaurus with red and bronze metallic plating and a distinctive dorsal spine sail.

data.name: Junkheap (Age of Extinction)
data.description: KSI-created drone that can split into three separate robots using particulate Transformium technology. Green and white robot mode. Transforms into a green Waste Management garbage truck.

data.name: Cade Yeager (Age of Extinction / The Last Knight)
data.description: Muscular middle-aged man with a goatee and weathered appearance, typically in work clothes or tactical gear. Texas inventor turned Autobot ally. Portrayed by Mark Wahlberg.

data.name: Tessa Yeager (Age of Extinction)
data.description: Blonde teenage girl typically in casual rural Texas attire. Cade Yeager's daughter drawn into the Transformer conflict. Portrayed by Nicola Peltz.

data.name: Joshua Joyce (Age of Extinction)
data.description: Well-dressed tech mogul with styled gray hair and designer glasses, typically in expensive suits or business casual. KSI founder. Portrayed by Stanley Tucci.

data.name: Harold Attinger (Age of Extinction)
data.description: Stern-faced older man with a commanding presence, typically in dark suits or government attire. Rogue CIA operative leading the anti-Transformer black ops unit. Portrayed by Kelsey Grammer.

data.name: Hot Rod (The Last Knight)
data.description: Flashy gray and orange robot with a round, expressive face and time-slowing bubble gun weapon. Transforms into a gunmetal gray Lamborghini Centenario with orange accents.

data.name: Cogman (The Last Knight)
data.description: Small, refined silver and black robot with a proper butler-like demeanor and precise movements. Transforms into a silver Aston Martin DB11. Described as a Headmaster unit.

data.name: Nitro Zeus (The Last Knight)
data.description: Tall, imposing dark gray and teal robot with a pointed head crest, broad wings, and a cocky stance. Transforms into a fighter jet with swept-back wings and angular stealth design.

data.name: Quintessa (The Last Knight)
data.description: Ethereal, humanoid alien sorceress with a slender feminine form, multiple floating face plates that shift to express emotion, and glowing purple energy emanating from her body. No vehicle alt mode.

data.name: Dragonstorm (The Last Knight)
data.description: Massive three-headed mechanical dragon formed from multiple Guardian Knights. Bronze, gold, and silver plating with medieval armor aesthetics, fire-breathing heads, and enormous wingspan.

data.name: Sqweeks (The Last Knight)
data.description: Tiny, damaged blue and rust-patched robot with a cracked visor and one functioning wheel. Unable to fully transform from his Vespa-style scooter mode due to extensive battle damage.

data.name: Canopy (The Last Knight)
data.description: Large, camouflaged robot disguised as a pile of rubble and debris rather than a vehicle. Brown, gray, and rust-colored plating designed to blend into destroyed urban environments.

data.name: Onslaught (The Last Knight)
data.description: Bulky green and gray robot with a tow truck crane arm and heavy industrial build similar to Long Haul. Transforms into a green Western Star 4900SF tow truck.

data.name: Mohawk (The Last Knight)
data.description: Small, wild Decepticon covered in graffiti-style markings and random bladed weapons with a spiky mohawk crest. Transforms into a Confederate P51 Combat Fighter motorcycle.

data.name: Dreadbot (The Last Knight)
data.description: Ramshackle, cobbled-together robot decorated with Christmas lights and junk. Transforms into a battered Volkswagen Microbus festooned with holiday decorations.

data.name: Sharp-T (The Last Knight)
data.description: Miniature mechanical Tyrannosaurus rex with shiny metallic plating, tiny arms, and fire-breathing capability. A baby Dinobot roughly the size of a large dog.

data.name: Pterry (The Last Knight)
data.description: Miniature mechanical pteranodon with metallic wings, a long beak, and playful demeanor. A baby Dinobot small enough to perch on a person's arm, trained to fetch objects.

data.name: Tops (The Last Knight)
data.description: Miniature mechanical triceratops with metallic horn array, frill, and compact body. A baby Dinobot roughly the size of a large dog with chrome and silver plating.

data.name: Viviane Wembly (The Last Knight)
data.description: Elegant young woman with brown hair, typically in professional academic attire befitting an Oxford professor. Last descendant of Merlin. Portrayed by Laura Haddock.

data.name: Edmund Burton (The Last Knight)
data.description: Distinguished elderly British nobleman with white hair and a tweed suit, carrying himself with aristocratic bearing. Last of the Order of the Witwiccans. Portrayed by Anthony Hopkins.

data.name: Izabella (The Last Knight)
data.description: Young Latina girl in worn, scavenged clothing appropriate for living in the ruins of Chicago. Resourceful orphan who repairs damaged Autobots. Portrayed by Isabela Merced.

data.name: Shatter (Bumblebee)
data.description: Red and black robot with a sleek, angular G1-inspired design, feminine build, and sharp facial features. Triple changer that transforms into a red 1971 Plymouth GTX muscle car and a Harrier jump jet.

data.name: Dropkick (Bumblebee)
data.description: Blue and gray robot with a stocky, aggressive build and G1-inspired cleaner design language. Triple changer that transforms into a blue 1974 AMC Javelin muscle car and a Bell AH-1 SuperCobra helicopter.

data.name: Blitzwing (Bumblebee)
data.description: Large gray and red Seeker with a distinctive tri-faced head design and broad-shouldered frame. Transforms into an F-4 Phantom II fighter jet in gray military livery. G1-inspired angular design.

data.name: Cliffjumper (Bumblebee)
data.description: Red Autobot with a compact, rounded G1-inspired design seen briefly during the Cybertron battle sequence. Small horned head and classic proportions distinct from the Bayverse mechanical complexity.

data.name: Charlie Watson (Bumblebee)
data.description: Teenage girl with brown hair and a punk-adjacent style, often wearing band t-shirts, flannel shirts, and jeans typical of late-1980s California. Portrayed by Hailee Steinfeld.

data.name: Memo (Bumblebee)
data.description: Young Latino man with dark curly hair, typically in casual 1980s attire including graphic tees and sneakers. Charlie Watson's earnest, nerdy neighbor. Portrayed by Jorge Lendeborg Jr.

data.name: Jack Burns (Bumblebee)
data.description: Rugged military man with a buzz cut and stern demeanor, typically in Sector Seven tactical uniform or military dress. Portrayed by John Cena.

data.name: Mirage (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Flashy silver and blue robot with a cocky grin, hologram projectors, and a showman's flair. Can shapeshift and generate illusions. Transforms into a silver Porsche 911 Carrera RS 3.8 with blue and orange racing livery.

data.name: Scourge (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Imposing black and silver robot with glowing purple dark-energy accents, a crown-like head crest, and a grille decorated with stolen faction insignias. Transforms into an armored black Peterbilt 359 semi-truck.

data.name: Nightbird (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Sleek black and purple robot with a ninja-like design, dual katana swords, and rocket thrusters for aerial maneuvers. Transforms into a black Nissan GT-R R33.

data.name: Battletrap (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Bulky, menacing dark brown and gray robot with heavy armor plating and a chain-flail weapon. Transforms into a rusted, battle-worn GMC C70 tow truck.

data.name: Unicron (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Planet-sized mechanical entity with a ringed, Saturn-like form and enormous maw for consuming worlds. Depicted primarily as a looming cosmic threat with purple and dark gray metallic surface and glowing internal energy.

data.name: Optimus Primal (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Tall, powerful robot with organic gorilla-inspired proportions, silver and black armor plating, and a noble, expressive face. Wields twin swords. Transforms into a realistic mechanical silverback gorilla.

data.name: Airazor (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Sleek, avian-inspired robot with feathered wing panels, golden and brown coloring, and a falcon-themed head design. Transforms into a realistic mechanical peregrine falcon with articulated metal feathers.

data.name: Rhinox (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Massive, powerfully built gray and green robot with thick armor plating and a rhino horn on the forehead. Wields a large hammer. Transforms into a heavily armored mechanical rhinoceros.

data.name: Cheetor (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Agile, sleek golden-yellow robot with cheetah-spotted panel accents, a lithe athletic build, and feline facial features. Transforms into a swift mechanical cheetah with articulated metal fur.

data.name: Wheeljack (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Stocky, friendly white and green robot with ear-fin indicators and a workshop-stained appearance. Transforms into a tan and white 1970 Volkswagen Type 2 microbus with peace symbol decals.

data.name: Noah Diaz (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Young man of Dominican descent with a fade haircut, typically in casual 1990s streetwear including sneakers and a jacket. Former military electronics expert from Brooklyn. Portrayed by Anthony Ramos.

data.name: Elena Wallace (Rise of the Beasts)
data.description: Young woman with dark curly hair, typically in smart-casual academic attire. Museum intern and artifact researcher with a passion for history. Portrayed by Dominique Fishback.
